# oMyTree

> oMyTree is a writing and thinking workspace for structured dialogue, tree-based reasoning, and collaborative knowledge building.

Use this file as the entry point for high-signal public information. Prefer policy and docs pages for authoritative statements. Authenticated product surfaces are not public reference material.

## Primary

- [Home](https://www.omytree.com/): Product overview and main navigation.
- [About](https://www.omytree.com/about): Company and mission context.
- [Pricing](https://www.omytree.com/pricing): Plan and billing overview.
- [Documentation](https://www.omytree.com/docs): Product docs index.
- [Changelog](https://www.omytree.com/changelog): Release history and updates.

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.omytree.com/privacy): Data handling and privacy terms.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.omytree.com/terms): Legal terms for service usage.
- [Refund Policy](https://www.omytree.com/refund): Payment and refund conditions.

## Localized

- [中文首页](https://www.omytree.com/zh-Hans-CN): Chinese localized landing page.

## Optional

- [Login](https://www.omytree.com/auth/login): Authentication entry point (session-gated flows).
- [App](https://www.omytree.com/app): Authenticated workspace (not generally crawlable public content).
